title: RPP Job Payload
description: Render job payload for the Robotic Property Photographer. May be a single job object or a single-element array containing one job object.

oneOf.description: Single-element array wrapping one job object (accepted by n8n and other automation tools).

linear_ring.description: A closed ring of [longitude, latitude] pairs. Must have at least 4 positions (first and last are identical).

geojson_polygon.description: A GeoJSON Polygon geometry object. The first ring is the outer boundary; any additional rings are interior holes.

coordinates.description: Array of linear rings. Index 0 is the outer ring; indices 1+ are holes.

centroid_object.description: Canonical centroid as a {lon, lat} numeric object.

centroid_array.description: Centroid as a [longitude, latitude] numeric array.

centroid_geojson_point.description: Centroid as a GeoJSON Point geometry. coordinates must be numeric [longitude, latitude].

job.description: A single render job describing the property to photograph.

allOf.description: A centroid is required. Supply either the 'centroid' field (object, array, or GeoJSON Point) or separate string/number 'lat' and 'lon' fields.
A boundary is required. Supply either the 'boundary' field (GeoJSON Polygon or flat outer ring) or the legacy 'geometry' field (GeoJSON Polygon).

centroid.description: Property centroid. Accepted forms: {lon, lat} object, [lon, lat] array, or GeoJSON Point geometry.

lat.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. Fallback centroid source used when the 'centroid' field is absent.

lon.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. Fallback centroid source used when the 'centroid' field is absent.

boundary.description: Property boundary polygon. Accepted forms: GeoJSON Polygon geometry object (canonical), or a flat outer-ring array [[lon, lat], ...] (legacy — automatically wrapped into a Polygon).

geometry.description: Property boundary polygon (legacy alias for 'boundary'). Must be a GeoJSON Polygon geometry object. Ignored when 'boundary' is also present.

elevation.description: Terrain elevation at the centroid in meters above sea level. Used for camera positioning.

centroid_elevation.description: Alias for 'elevation'. Applied when 'elevation' is absent.

acreage.description: Human-readable property area string. Passed through as-is to render metadata.

ll_gisacre.description: GIS-computed acreage. Converted to the string '{value} ACRES' and stored as 'acreage' when 'acreage' is absent.

acres.description: Property area in acres. Converted to the string '{value} ACRES' and stored as 'acreage' when both 'acreage' and 'll_gisacre' are absent.

customer_id.description: Unique identifier for the customer placing the order. Echoed in render output metadata.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the render order. Echoed in render output metadata.

srcmap.description: URL of a reference overhead satellite image (e.g. a Google Static Maps URL). When present it is fetched and appended to the render output as an additional 'reference_overhead' shot.

is_test.description: When true, a timestamp is appended to the output filename to prevent overwriting previous test renders.

owner.description: Property owner name. Informational only — not rendered in output images.

county.description: County in which the property is located. Informational only — not rendered in output images.

shotList.description: Explicit list of shot IDs to capture. Validated but currently superseded by the SNAPSHOT_MODE environment variable / workflow input.
